name: Generowanie Dokumentacji Doxygen

on:
  push:
    branches: [ master ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write
    steps:
      - name: Pobierz kod
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Uruchom Doxygen
        uses: mattnotmitt/doxygen-action@v1.9.8
        with:
          doxyfile-path: ./Doxyfile

      - name: Publikuj na GitHub Pages
        uses: peaceiris/actions-gh-pages@v3
        with:
          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          publish_dir: ./html
